# octocov-central

This repository is the central octocov dashboard for gitignore-in projects. It
collects octocov reports from configured source repositories, commits generated
badge SVGs under the badges directory, and publishes the generated metrics table below.

Use this repository to copy badge Markdown for supported projects or to check
the latest central-mode metrics. To add or remove a project, update the trusted
artifact sources in .octocov.yml; the Collect workflow reads those reports
on schedule, pushes to main, pull requests, and manual dispatch. Workflow
post-processing keeps this orientation text and metric notes in front of
the octocov generated table.

## Repositories

Metric units and precision are described in [Metric Values](docs/metrics.md).

| Repository | Coverage | Code to Test Ratio | Test Execution Time | Badges |
